strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple domains
Proven ability to own end-to-end systems, from backend services to user-facing UIs and DevOps tooling
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical education, indicating communication and collaboration skills
concerns: Resume lists senior/staff roles but claims entry-level position, raising questions about alignment with junior/mid-level expectations
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services like RDS/ECS, which are preferred or required
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise and a strong engineering ethos, with relevant tech stack exposure and open-source initiative, but their senior title history, lack of key preferred technologies, and limited German proficiency create significant misalignment with the junior/mid-level, on-site focused role.
